violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor found dirty throughout kitchen. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee change gloves, but she did not wash her hands before putting on a new pair of gloves. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. Bowl was found stored in the bin of cornstarch for use as a scoop. Bowls should not be used as scoops. Scoops have handles to prevent hands from coming in contact with food item that is being dispensed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Hot holding display case, sushi cart and shelving near the 3 compartment bins were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
